caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a studio within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. The man seems engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business, entrepreneurship, or lifestyle, given the context of the podcast's name. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional tone, blending the elements of a retail space with a media production setup.
